{{nihongo|'''Yukeno Shrine'''|弓削神社 二座}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building

| native_name = 弓削神社 二座
| mapframe = yes

{{nihongo|'''Yukeno Shrine'''|弓削神社 二座}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yukeno Shrine'''|弓削神社 二座}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yukeno Shrine'''|弓削神社 二座}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

| native_name = 弓削神社 二座
| mapframe = yes

{{nihongo|'''Yukeno Shrine'''|弓削神社 二座}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yukeno Shrine'''|弓削神社 二座}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].
